body: Hi, this is William from Marceau Solutions. {business_name} in {city} has great reviews but no online booking. Just helped 3 Naples gyms add 24/7 scheduling - all saw 40%+ more appointments. Interested? (239) 398-5676. Reply STOP to opt out.
notes: Focuses on appointment booking pain point. Two SMS segments.

variants.body: Hi {business_name} owner! William from Marceau Solutions (239-398-5676). I see you have {rating}⭐ reviews but no online booking. Want to see how we added 24/7 scheduling for 3 Naples gyms? All got 40% more appointments. Text YES. Reply STOP to opt out.

Hi, William from Marceau Solutions. Do you lose appointments because people can't book {business_name} online? Just set up 24/7 booking for 3 local gyms - all doubled their new member signups. (239) 398-5676. Reply STOP to opt out.
